---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Resyntha
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact

Describe who would benefit from this feature and how.

- [ ] **Users**: End-user facing improvement
- [ ] **Developers**: Developer experience or API improvement
- [ ] **Operations**: Deployment, monitoring, or reliability improvement
- [ ] **Documentation**: Documentation or onboarding improvement

## Implementation Hints

If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
